coachingSessionId.title: coachingSessionId
coachingSessionId.description: The Salesforce record Id of the selected coaching session.

foundSession.title: foundSession
foundSession.description: Indicates whether the selected coaching session was found.

improvedScript.title: improvedScript
improvedScript.description: An example of a stronger or improved response the agent can study and practice.

improvementArea.title: improvementArea
improvementArea.description: The primary area the agent should improve and focus on during coaching.

mode.title: mode
mode.description: The coaching mode associated with the selected coaching session, such as Onboarding or Cruise Control.

rehearsalCompleted.title: rehearsalCompleted
rehearsalCompleted.description: Indicates whether the rehearsal for the coaching session has already been completed.

rehearsalScenario.title: rehearsalScenario
rehearsalScenario.description: The practice scenario the agent should use to rehearse the improved behavior.

status.title: status
status.description: The current status of the coaching session.

topic.title: topic
topic.description: The coaching topic for the selected coaching session.

whatWentWell.title: whatWentWell
whatWentWell.description: Guidance describing what the agent did well.
